title: MeetingPack
description: Schema for the meeting-pack command output. A structured pre-meeting dossier for the RM covering client context, portfolio summary, discussion topics, market themes, agenda, and open follow-ups.

client_id.description: Unique CRM identifier for the client.

meeting_date.description: Date of the scheduled meeting (ISO 8601, YYYY-MM-DD).

prepared_by.description: RM user identifier or name who requested this meeting pack.

prepared_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this meeting pack was generated.

client_summary.description: High-level snapshot of the client relationship for quick RM reference.

profile_snapshot.description: 2–4 sentence narrative covering the client's background, goals, and key relationship notes.

relationship_notes.description: Key qualitative notes about the relationship (communication preferences, sensitivities, recent context).

portfolio_summary.description: Current portfolio snapshot for RM review before the meeting.

total_value.description: Total portfolio market value in the specified currency.

currency.description: Portfolio valuation currency (ISO 4217, e.g. SGD, USD).

as_of_date.description: Valuation date for the portfolio snapshot.

top_holdings.description: Top holdings by weight for RM reference.

performance_note.description: Optional brief performance note for this holding (e.g. +12% YTD, recent earnings beat).

notable_changes.description: Significant portfolio changes since the last meeting worth discussing (e.g. large price moves, position changes, new additions).

discussion_topics.description: Prepared discussion topics for the meeting, ordered by priority.

topic_title.description: Short, clear topic headline (e.g. 'Q3 Portfolio Performance Review').

context.description: Background context for the RM — why this topic is relevant now.

supporting_data.description: Key data points or facts supporting this topic (formatted as brief bullets or a short paragraph).

talking_points.description: Suggested talking points or questions the RM can use to guide the conversation.

estimated_time_mins.description: Estimated time allocation for this topic in minutes.

market_context.description: Relevant macro and market themes to provide context for the portfolio discussion.

theme.description: Market theme headline (e.g. 'Fed rate path uncertainty', 'China reopening trade').

relevance_to_client.description: Why this theme is relevant to this specific client's portfolio or goals.

brief_summary.description: 2–3 sentence summary of the theme and its market implications.

suggested_agenda.description: Recommended meeting agenda, ordered by sequence.

duration_mins.description: Allocated time for this agenda item in minutes.

open_follow_ups.description: Open follow-up items from previous interactions that should be addressed or referenced in this meeting.

preparation_checklist.description: RM preparation checklist — items to complete before the meeting.

item.description: Checklist item description (e.g. 'Review latest portfolio valuation report').

completed.description: Whether the RM has completed this preparation step.

internal_notes.description: INTERNAL USE ONLY — RM notes and context not intended for client distribution. This field must be excluded from any version of this document shared with the client.
